runners.formComment: In the money last time at this track (16.98) in a Grade 5, finishing a one length second. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and seven places from 14 starts. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at this track (16.98) in a Grade 5, finishing a one length second. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and seven places from 14 starts. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

runners.formComment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split and went on to clock 19.72 when a 0.8 lengths winner over 342m at Angle Park. Looks the one to beat again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split and went on to clock 19.72 when a 0.8 lengths winner over 342m at Angle Park. Looks the one to beat again.

runners.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when third (20.12) over 342m at Angle Park. Aided by a low draw but will need a little luck to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage fourth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when third (20.12) over 342m at Angle Park. Aided by a low draw but will need a little luck to feature.

runners.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 3rd on April 6 over 342m at Angle Park behind Son Of Maple beaten 3 lengths (19.76) in a Grade 2/3/4. Top-three hope with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 3rd on April 6 over 342m at Angle Park behind Son Of Maple beaten 3 lengths (19.76) in a Grade 2/3/4. Top-three hope with the right run.

runners.formComment: Was out of the placings at his last run before a break of seven months when fifth at Murray Bridge over 300m. Awkward draw and looks safely held this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings at his last run before a break of seven months when fifth at Murray Bridge over 300m. Awkward draw and looks safely held this time.

runners.formComment: Good performance to win by 1.75 lengths at this track over 300m (17.05) beating Jazzy Boo in Grade 6 on April 8. Would be better placed in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by 1.75 lengths at this track over 300m (17.05) beating Jazzy Boo in Grade 6 on April 8. Would be better placed in something easier.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back at Angle Park over 342m in 19.71. Followed that up with a minor placing over 342m at Angle Park at Grade 5 nine days ago. Going well and can bounce back to winning form.

formComments.comment: Won two starts back at Angle Park over 342m in 19.71. Followed that up with a minor placing over 342m at Angle Park at Grade 5 nine days ago. Going well and can bounce back to winning form.

runners.formComment: Hit the frame latest (17.02) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Super consistent from the draw with a win and four places from five starts. Leading player.
